name: Клятва Рвения
description: Zealots who take the Oath of Zeal are devoted to rooting out heresy and corruption wherever they find it. They serve as inquisitors, judges, and executioners, wielding divine authority to expose lies and punish the wicked. Their fervent devotion grants them supernatural insight and the power to compel truth from even the most stubborn deceivers.

features.name: Oath of Zeal Spells
features.description: The magic of your oath ensures you always have certain spells ready; when you reach a Paladin level specified in the Oath of Zeal Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

features.name: Mark of the Heretic
features.description: As a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can expend one use of your Channel Divinity to mark a creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself as a heretic. For 1 minute, your weapon attacks and {@variantrule Unarmed Strikes|XPHB} against the chosen creature can score a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB} on a roll of 19 or 20 on the {@dice d20}. In addition, whenever the target starts its turn, you can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} to make a melee attack against that creature if it's within reach.

features.name: Aura of Clarity
features.description: You and your allies have Immunity to the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition while in your Aura of Protection. If a {@condition Blinded|XPHB} ally enters the aura, that condition has no effect on that ally while there. Additionally, you can see {@condition Invisible|XPHB} creatures within your Aura of Protection.

features.name: Compel Confession
features.description: You can cast {@spell Zone of Truth|XPHB} without expending a spell slot. In addition, a creature that succeeds on its saving throw takes {@damage 1d6} Psychic damage at the start of each of its turns while in your {@spell Zone of Truth|XPHB} until it chooses to fail its saving throw instead.

features.name: Apocalyptic Revelation
features.description: As a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can reveal the true nature of your enemies for 1 minute. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. You can also restore your use of it by expending a level 5 spell slot (no action required). You gain the following benefits. {@b Blinding Glory.} Enemies that start their turn within 5 feet of you must make a Constitution saving throw against the Paladin's spell save DC. On a failed save, the creature has the {@condition Blinded|XPHB} condition until the start of its next turn. {@b See the Truth.} You have {@variantrule Truesight|XPHB} with a range of 60 feet. {@b Smite the Heretic.} As a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB}, you can choose a creature within 60 feet of yourself and reveal its weaknesses. You and your allies have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against that creature.
